compiled_state.title: Add scrutiny pipeline invocation to Follow-on Epic Gate
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Modify plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md Phase 3 Step 0 (Follow-on Epic Gate, lines 419-441). Rewrite the "Procedure for each follow-on epic" section to:

1. Determine request_origin ("scope-split" if scope reviewer recommended split, "user" otherwise)
2. Set follow_on_depth (0 for direct follow-ons, incremented from parent)
3. If follow_on_depth >= 1: present as ticket stub for user approval without running scrutiny pipeline. Stub format: title, context, proposed SCs, note it needs /dso:brainstorm before implementation.
4. If follow_on_depth == 0: draft follow-on epic spec, then invoke the scrutiny pipeline with {caller_name} and {caller_prompts_dir}. For scope-split epics (request_origin: "scope-split"), pre-strip Part A artifact references before pipeline invocation.
5. After scrutiny pipeline completes, present follow-on epic with scrutiny results for user approval.
6. Expose follow_on_depth as named state variable: follow_on_scrutiny_depth = <value> for the planning-intelligence log.

**TDD**: Task 37cc-bb25 RED tests (test_followon_gate_invokes_scrutiny_pipeline, test_followon_gate_depth_cap, test_followon_gate_request_origin_part_a_skip, test_followon_gate_exposes_depth_variable, test_followon_gate_stub_presentation) turn GREEN after this implementation.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (EDIT — Phase 3 Step 0)
- .test-index (EDIT — remove [test-follow-on-scrutiny] RED marker after tests pass)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] All 5 follow-on scrutiny tests pass (GREEN state)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-follow-on-scrutiny.sh
- [ ] Existing brainstorm tests still pass (no regression)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh
- [ ] Step 0 references scrutiny pipeline invocation
  Verify: sed -n '/### Step 0:/,/### Step 1:/p' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md | grep -q "scrutiny pipeline\|epic-scrutiny-pipeline"
- [ ] Depth cap check exists in Step 0
  Verify: sed -n '/### Step 0:/,/### Step 1:/p' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md | grep -q "follow_on_depth"
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index (GREEN promotion)
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test-follow-on-scrutiny\]' .test-index
